Upload Bank Statements

We need 0 monthly PDF statements from your bank. These never leave your session — they're processed locally.

📄

Drop your PDF here or click to browse

PDF only · Max 50 MB · Bank statements only

📥 How to download your bank statement

Chase

  1. Log in → Accounts tab → select account
  2. Click "Statements" in left menu
  3. Choose month → Download PDF

Bank of America

  1. Log in → select account
  2. Statements & Documents (top nav)
  3. Select period → Download PDF

Wells Fargo

  1. Log in → select account
  2. Statements tab
  3. Choose date range → View & Download

Other Banks

  1. Look for "Statements" or "Documents" in your account
  2. Select the correct month
  3. Download as PDF

🔒 Your statements are stored locally in your browser. We never upload them to any server.
